text.title: Conversational Agents Output Contract
text.summary: JSON Schema for ConversationalAgents config + turn entry shape.

example.code: agents: - {name: proposer, model: sonnet, system_prompt: "You propose solutions for the user's debugging task. End every reply with TASK COMPLETE when you are confident."} - {name: critic, model: opus, system_prompt: "You critique the proposer's solutions; surface counterexamples. Never end with TASK COMPLETE."} termination_phrase: "TASK COMPLETE" max_turns: 12 window_size: 3 token_budget: 20000

example.note: Identical system_prompts (rule r5), empty termination_phrase (rule r1), max_turns > 30 (rule r2), window_size > 8 (rule r3), no token_budget (rule r4).

list.item: ≥2 agents with distinct names AND distinct system_prompts.
